author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Capcom Spotlight Livestream (June 2026)
Tune into the Capcom Spotlight on June 25 at 2pm PT, with a focus on Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection, Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen, and Onimusha: Way of the Sword. Check out the roughly 35-minute livestream for a rlatest news and updates on Capcom's announced lineup of games.

#capcom #spotlight #monsterhunter #dragonsdogma2 #onimushawayofthesword 


Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen Gameplay Overview | Capcom Spotlight
Learn more about what to expect from Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen in this gameplay overview from the Capcom Spotlight. See timestamps below.

#dragonsdogma #darkarisen #capcom

0:00 Intro
0:15 Gameplay Breakdown with Kento Kinoshita
0:47 The New Experience (New Story, challenges, and Character Customization)
1:52 Why Dark Arisen Now
2:30 Can Players Enjoy the gameplay like the original Dark Arisen
3:32 The Fallen Dragon and New Character
4:11 Dragon's Dogma 2 Update
6:00 Outro

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Another Xbox Console Price Hike
On August 1st the Xbox 512GB consoles are going up $100, 1TB up $150 and the 2TB will be discontinued. If you were thinking of playing GTA 6 on Xbox you better buy before August 1st.  

#xbox #gta6 #gaming

https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
63 New GTA 6 Screenshots Reveal HUGE Details
Rockstar dropped a ton of new images for GTA 6 pertaining to the ultimate edition. This screenshots mostly showcases the various customization options in GTA 6's ultimate edition. These show clothing, cars, tattoos, and hairstyles for Jason and Lucia. Here's everything we learned from those screenshots and more.

#gta6 #grandtheftauto #rockstar #gaming
